name: Soviet Union (USSR)
description: The USSR flag featured a red field with a gold hammer and sickle, symbolizing the unity of workers and peasants.

name: Ottoman Empire
description: The Ottoman flag bore a red field with a white crescent moon and star, symbols still used in modern Turkey.

name: Timurid Empire
description: The Timurid dynasty ruled Central Asia and Persia, known for its patronage of arts and the city of Samarkand.

name: Byzantine Empire
description: The Eastern Roman Empire used a golden double-headed eagle on a purple field, symbolizing imperial power.

name: Mughal Empire
description: The Mughal Empire dominated the Indian subcontinent with a rich tradition of art, architecture, and governance.

name: Imperial Japan
description: The Rising Sun flag with sixteen rays represented Imperial Japan's expansionist era and military power.

name: Yugoslavia
description: Yugoslavia united South Slavic peoples under a blue, white, and red tricolor with a red star.

name: Czechoslovakia
description: Czechoslovakia's flag featured white, red, and a blue triangle — now used by the Czech Republic.

name: Confederate States
description: The Confederate Battle Flag became one of the most controversial symbols in American history.

name: Holy Roman Empire
description: The Holy Roman Empire's black eagle on gold is the oldest continuously used heraldic symbol in Europe.

name: Mongol Empire
description: The largest contiguous land empire in history, the Mongol Empire stretched from Asia to Eastern Europe.

name: Roman Empire
description: The SPQR standard of Rome represented the Senate and People of Rome across centuries of civilization.
